    • Fictionmania Story Details


    Title:A Perfect Housewife
    File Name:A_Perfect_Housewife.txt
    File Size: 16.9 kB
    Author: Pollymeric 
    Date Added07/10/2026
    Old Name:Hobson Bucknall
    New Name:Sarah Bucknall
    Other Names:Jane Stanton, Mme Hecate
    Rating:G
    Complete:yes
    Categories:Age Progression AI Artwork Crossdressing / TV Lingerie Sweet / Sentimental Transitioning Uniforms Voluntary 
    Key Words:Corsets Costumes Diapers or Little Girls Hormones Maids or French Maids 
    Age:College Age 19-26 to Adult-AP
    Synopsis:24 year old Hobson Bucknall's life takes a strange turn after divorce when ex mother in law puts him on the right track.
    I've never written a 'maid' story, this is as close as I get
    Reads:4833






    crossdress
